audit_items.proof_trace: The staleness check is fully enforced: `minTimestamp = block.timestamp - feedInfo.stalenessThreshold`, the freshest available timestamp (Data Streams or Data Feed fallback) is used, and `if (withValidation && isStale) revert StaleFeedData()` at L413-415 is on every code path. All actual trade entry points (bid L429, performUpkeep L315/342, GPV2 L153) call with `withValidation=true`; non-trade callers (checkUpkeep, view quote) use `false` by intentional design and check the returned `isValid` flag.
